title: CBDT Expands Scope of Eligible Infrastructure Businesses Under Income-tax Act, 2025
content:
# CBDT Expands Scope of Eligible Infrastructure Businesses Under Income-tax Act, 2025

Ek important update hai! Government ne infrastructure sub-sectors ko Income-tax Act, 2025 ke तहत eligible businesses announce kiya hai. This move aims to provide clarity and encourage investment in critical infrastructure development.

Here's a quick rundown:
*   **What's New:** The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) has specified certain infrastructure-related businesses as eligible under the Income-tax Act, 2025. This includes businesses engaged in infrastructure sub-sectors listed in the Updated Harmonised Master List of Infrastructure Sub-Sectors, which was issued by the Department of Economic Affairs (DEA) on September 19, 2025.
*   **Why it Matters:** This notification broadens the scope of recognized infrastructure activities under the new tax framework. It aims to align tax provisions with the government's infrastructure development agenda and is expected to benefit businesses by providing clarity on their status under Schedule V of the Income-tax Act, 2025.
*   **Notification Details:** This update comes via **Notification No. 70/2026**, issued by the Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue, and dated **June 1, 2026**. It has come into force from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://egazette.gov.in/(S(xnpib1sryv2kf5ohrmwdt4l1))/ViewPDF.aspx)

*Published on: 4 June 2026*
